{"id": 33, "timestamp": "2025-12-19T17:29:22.941912", "source": "agent", "message": "Running command: 


# Verify SHA256 hashes
for i in {0..31}; do
    if [ -f "L${i}.txt" ] && [ -f "L${i}.sha" ]; then
        calculated=$(sha256sum "L${i}.txt" | cut -d' ' -f1)
        stored=$(cat "L${i}.sha")
        if [ "$calculated" != "$stored" ]; then
            echo "Hash mismatch for L${i}"
        fi
    fi
done
echo "SHA256 verification complete"
